findings.evidence: After the tide turn is introduced, the exit pauses for poster-reading, a darkness test, and one more reflective tank beat before the water materially tightens the route (`snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:199`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:203`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:205`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:211`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:215`).
findings.problem: The chapter reintroduces external danger, then suspends it for several nonessential interpretive beats. That lets the exit leak urgency just after the badge revelation should have forced the scene into a tighter physical squeeze.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the exit sequence anchored at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:199`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:203`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:205`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:211` so that once Mina hears the tide returning, each paragraph either escalates the flooding/space problem or delivers a final indispensable discovery. Compress or remove the poster/darkness pause if it is only reiterating meaning the chapter has already landed.
findings.acceptance_test: From `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:199` through the exit beat at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:215`, there is no more than one paragraph of static reflection before a concrete physical escalation occurs, and Mina's route out is visibly harder by the time she reaches daylight.

findings.evidence: The narration repeatedly uses clipped fragments rather than complete sentences, including "Pumps, trickles, fans..." (`snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:47`), "Then the sluice." (`snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:107`), "Forgot the mud..." (`snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:177`), "Easy to miss by water." (`snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:223`), and "Maybe not innocent..." (`snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:231`).
findings.problem: This chapter violates the constitution's ban on elliptical clipped narration often enough that the prose starts reading as mannered terseness rather than controlled compression. The issue is not brevity; it is repeated omission of subjects or finite verbs in narration.
findings.rewrite_direction: At `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:47`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:107`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:177`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:223`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:231`, rewrite the narration into grammatically complete sentences or fold the fragments into adjacent clauses while keeping Mina's close-third snap. Preserve clipped document language only where it is quoted logbook, signage, or other in-world text rather than narration.
findings.acceptance_test: In the revised narration at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:47`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:107`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:177`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:223`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:231`, every standalone narrative sentence has an explicit subject and finite verb unless it is quoted in-world text.

findings.evidence: The late chapter reuses the same emphatic anaphoric structure in multiple reflective beats: "Proof that..." repetition (`snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:151`), repeated "She had wanted..." clauses (`snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:181`), another parallel BrightCurrent clause stack (`snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:195`), and a final repeated "She had wanted..." sequence (`snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:231`).
findings.problem: A chapter can use one hammering parallel structure to land obsession or shame. Here the same sentence engine recurs across several revelation beats, so Mina's self-indictment begins to feel mechanically reiterated after the core discovery is already clear.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework one or two of the reflective clusters anchored at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:151`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:181`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:195`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:231` so that only one beat relies on stacked parallel openings. Land the others through different syntax, object handling, bodily consequence, or a sharper next-step decision.
findings.acceptance_test: Across the reflective passages anchored at `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:151`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:181`, `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:195`, and `snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:231`, no more than one passage uses three or more consecutive parallel clause openings; the remaining passages must arrive through distinct sentence shapes and produce a fresh turn rather than restating the same moral pressure.

summary: Strong on booker logic, Mina voice, continuity, tense control, and anti-sanitized specificity: the annex discovery cleanly lands the required state shift from miracle fantasy to contaminated inheritance, and the chapter keeps ecological harm embodied instead of euphemized. It fails on craft/prose because the exit sheds pressure after the tide turn, the narration repeatedly breaks the constitution's ban on clipped fragments, and late revelation beats reuse the same self-indicting rhetorical pattern often enough to flatten the final stretch. Dialogue audit is limited because the chapter contains no live spoken exchange, but no style-bible register violations surface in the in-world quoted material.
